headline: The 5 Most Interesting Analyst Questions From Waters Corporation’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Waters Corporation’s first quarter saw a strong market response, as the company delivered results ahead of Wall Street’s revenue and earnings expectations despite headline sales declining year over year. Management pointed to robust organic growth in its legacy divisions and better-than-expected early performance from recently acquired Biosciences and Diagnostic Solutions businesses.
